message:
🐛 Fix architecture diagram label truncation (#2497)

- Remove overflow-hidden from LLMdFlow parent container that was
  clipping SVG labels extending beyond the container bounds
- Expand SVG viewBox in LLMdFlow and EPPRouting to provide adequate
  vertical padding for node labels at top and bottom edges
- Increase stack name badge max-width from 80-100px to 180px across
  LLMdFlow, EPPRouting, PDDisaggregation, and KVCacheMonitor so
  stack names are no longer aggressively truncated
- Add title attribute to stack name badges for full-name tooltip
  on hover when truncation still occurs

Closes #2397

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
